title: Phase 15.1 — Full 12-Step Dry Run Validation
status: PASS — 12/12 steps validated for autonomous execution

steps.name: Technical Health Check
actions_proposed: Verify ads.txt HTTP 200 + correct pub ID

steps.name: Tier 3 Calculator Indexing
actions_proposed: Submit approved URLs via GSC UI
steps.blockers: If GSC session expires (redirect to accounts.google.com), skip and report

steps.name: Query Opportunity Discovery
steps.blockers: none — GSC API working after token refresh
steps.findings: 50 zero-click pages, 3 calculator pages with impressions (all ≤9 imp), highest query: 43 imp for 20000-loan

steps.name: Growth Action Selection
actions_proposed: Priority-order today's actions: P4 (indexing) > P6 (internal links) > P7 (outreach follow-ups) > P2/P3 (CTR — blocked by cooldown) > P5 (content — held for data)
steps.actions_rejected: P2, P3, P5 all held — data does not support action yet
steps.blockers: 48h cooldown on only pages with meaningful impressions

steps.name: Content Engine
actions_proposed: If found, create targeted content page
If not found, skip content creation
steps.rejection_reason: HOLD_FOR_DATA — no query with 10+ impressions yet. Only 4 queries with ≥3 imp, all for 20000-loan.
steps.blockers: Low query volume — GSC shows only 100 impressions/week total

steps.name: CTR & Near-Winner Engine
actions_proposed: CTR: 0 fixes applied — all impression pages in cooldown
Near-winner: 0 pushes applied — all near-winner pages in cooldown
steps.blockers: 48h cooldown. Expires Jun 6. 7 pages will become eligible then.

steps.name: Internal Authority Links
actions_proposed: Add 10-20 links from indexed T1/T2 calcs to newly submitted T3 Batch 7/8 calcs
steps.blockers: none — source files can be edited, deploy follows in Step 11

steps.name: Outreach & Backlink Engine
actions_proposed: Send max 5 follow-ups via Gmail SMTP
Find max 5 new prospects if approved
steps.actions_rejected: New prospects — held pending Authority Engine upgrade (Phase 15.1 TASK 2)
steps.blockers: Current outreach tracker has 35 entries, 7 sent with no replies. Follow-up system works but conversion needs improvement.

steps.name: Monetization Check
steps.blockers: AdSense not yet approved. 0 traffic = 0 revenue potential. Revenue estimate will remain $0 until traffic + AdSense approval.

steps.name: Deploy & Validate
actions_proposed: Check if source changes were made
If yes: git add -A, git commit, git push, wait 60-120s, verify HTTP 200, submit sitemaps

summary.held_or_rejected_actions: CTR (cooldown), Content (low data), Outreach new prospects (pending upgrade)
summary.actions_approved_today: Indexing (7 URLs), Internal links (10-20), Technical health (5 checks), Scoreboard update, Report generation
summary.overall_assessment: ALL 12 steps are safe for autonomous daily execution. The system correctly identifies when to hold actions (cooldown, low data) and does not force unsafe operations. Tomorrow's autonomous run will: index 7 Tier 3 calcs, add 10-20 internal links, pull GSC data, verify tech health, and generate report. No content or CTR actions until data supports them.
